name: NEAREST_AIRPORT
description: Newsletter signup — nearest UK departure airport slug.

name: TRAVEL_INTEREST
description: Newsletter signup — travel interest segment (see lib/travel-club-options.ts).

name: WATCH_AIRPORT
description: Route Watch signup — departure airport slug being watched.

name: WATCH_DESTINATION
description: Route Watch signup — destination slug being watched.

name: WATCH_ROUTE
description: Route Watch signup — comma-delimited list of watched route slugs (capped small; see MAX_WATCHED_ROUTES in lib/route-watch-config.ts), not a single value.

name: WATCH_REGION
description: Route Watch signup — destination region group.

name: WATCH_INTENT
description: Route Watch signup — traveller intent (see lib/route-watch-options.ts).
